title: boesenbergia trangensis
intro: Boesenbergia trangensis, also known as Thai ginger or Krachai Dam, is a type of rhizome plant native to Thailand, belonging to the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Its health benefits include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Boesenbergia trangensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Thai medicine preparations such as tonics and poultices.
